main_result: On the regenerated carry_jump-to-wrap state-chain object for m=13,15,17, the explicit formulas proposed in tmp/107 are exact: q is recovered from the phase-corner identity, rho and sigma are extracted exactly from (B,beta), and the raw current coordinates u and w are reconstructed exactly from (rho,beta,q0,sigma). The symbolic two-source collision pattern for bare (beta,q0,sigma) is also realized on every checked modulus.
